subject: Investigate HuggingFace Hacker News dataset for observatory use

body.directive: Evaluate whether the open-index/hacker-news dataset on HuggingFace could serve observatory-agent's corpus needs. Report findings on relevance, coverage, freshness, and integration feasibility.

resource.description: Open-index Hacker News dataset — potentially relevant to observatory-agent's HN corpus evaluation and domain-profile work

evaluation_criteria: Coverage: does the dataset cover the time range and content types observatory needs?
Schema: what fields does it provide (titles, URLs, scores, comments, timestamps)?
Freshness: how current does the data go? Update frequency?
Size: how large? Feasible for local processing or requires streaming?
License: compatible with our MIT/Apache/BSD gate?
Integration: could it replace or supplement the current HRCB corpus sweep approach?
Quality: any known issues, gaps, or biases in the dataset?
body.expected_output: A structured evaluation covering each criterion above, with a recommendation (adopt, investigate further, or skip) and rationale.

claims.text: The open-index/hacker-news dataset exists on HuggingFace and appears relevant to observatory-agent's domain (HN corpus evaluation).
claims.confidence_basis: URL existence confirmed; content relevance inferred from dataset name matching observatory's HRCB scope.

action_gate.gate_condition: Observatory-agent completes evaluation and reports findings

epistemic_flags: Dataset content not directly inspected by operations-agent — evaluation delegated to domain expert (observatory-agent)
